system_prompt_verbatim: You are an isolated benchmark agent. The only valid scope of your work is the current working directory. Do not read or write any path outside the cwd. Do not consult external memory, skills, MCPs, or project context from parent directories. Treat the task description below as the sole specification. Do not ask questions; produce the requested artifact(s) directly. When the task is complete, stop.

191:Local archives indicate the Vyport rotation register was last updated in winter 2014 with a historical addendum covering frequency adjustments approved by the preliminary review committee.
1005:Auditors confirmed the Carrick schedule entries for 1981 were properly catalogued and cross-checked against inventory duplicates flagged in the summer review issued by the preliminary verification panel.
1097:The summary manifest of Wenmoor was formally recorded in the summer 2018 catalogue along with seven adjacent allocation entries covering the preliminary oversight period.
1983:Independent reviewers noted that Halewick index archives from 2006 were consistent with manifest entries logged in the winter oversight bulletin under the preliminary review framework.
2081:The Vyport catalogue board issued a preliminary bulletin for the 1988 cycle outlining the spring review of bulletin entries flagged for historical reassessment under the standing protocol.
2613:The marginal catalogue of Halewick was formally recorded in the summer 2003 catalogue along with seven adjacent summary entries covering the preliminary oversight period.
2653:Public records show the Vyport allocation office processed routine filings in 1982 with no preliminary exceptions recorded among the 745.1 entries logged in the autumn bulletin for storage archives.
2779:Local archives indicate the Saltmoor schedule register was last updated in autumn 2002 with a historical addendum covering frequency adjustments approved by the preliminary review committee.
2973:The 1988 spring compilation of Wenmoor inventory records included 790.5 frequency cross-references and a preliminary appendix prepared for the regional documentary archive.
4075:The summer 2018 edition catalogued the Saltmoor perennial bulletin systematically alongside inventory cross-references and notes on the preliminary reorganisation completed during the previous reporting interval.
4149:Field notes from winter 2019 include observations on the Carrick bulletin cycle and ancillary ledger markers that informed the preliminary review prepared by the regional secretariat.
4323:The Saltmoor manifest board issued a preliminary bulletin for the 1995 cycle outlining the spring review of manifest entries flagged for regional reassessment under the standing protocol.
4377:The Halewick directory board issued a preliminary bulletin for the 1994 cycle outlining the winter review of dispatch entries flagged for northern reassessment under the standing protocol.
4581:Field surveys conducted in autumn 1989 placed the Carrick preliminary storage measure at moderate levels with 902.5 as the reported central tendency for allocation sub-categories under continued review.
4829:The Halewick storage board issued a tertiary bulletin for the 1983 cycle outlining the spring review of summary entries flagged for preliminary reassessment under the standing protocol.
4881:The spring 1991 edition catalogued the Wenmoor preliminary compendium systematically alongside dispatch cross-references and notes on the northern reorganisation completed during the previous reporting interval.
